name: Cherry Pinwheel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together egg and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the egg mixture, vanilla, and almond extracts to the flour mixture, stirring until well blended.
4. Reduce mixer speed to low and gradually fold in the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until just combined.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough into a rectangle measuring approximately 9x12 inches.
6. Transfer dough to a baking sheet. Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 15 minutes.
7. Uncover dough and spread cherry preserves evenly over the dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border.
8. Starting from the shorter side, roll up the dough tightly in a jelly-roll fashion.
9. Wrap the rolled dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours.
10. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
11. Spray two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
12. Unwrap frozen dough rolls and slice into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
13. Place slices onto prepared cookie sheets.
14. Bake until edges are golden brown, about 12-15 minutes.
15. Allow cookie sheets to cool for 1 minute before transferring cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
